ci_support_linux_64_python3.10.____cpyth:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  python:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
python:
- 3.10.* *_cpython
target_platform:
- linux-64

about.description:
abicheck is a Python-native ABI compatibility checker for C/C++ shared
libraries (.so files). It detects breaking changes between library versions
using a multi-tier approach: castxml header AST analysis, ELF symbol table
inspection, and DWARF debug info extraction.

Key features:
- 85 ChangeKinds across BREAKING / API_BREAK / COMPATIBLE severity tiers
- 100% parity with abi-compliance-checker (ABICC) for 55 documented scenarios
- ABICC drop-in CLI: accepts all major abi-compliance-checker flags
- Policy system: built-in profiles + YAML-based per-project overrides
- COMPATIBLE_WITH_RISK verdict for deployment-risk changes (e.g. new GLIBC requirements)
- Reports: Markdown, JSON, SARIF, HTML
- Linux only (ELF/DWARF); Windows PE and macOS Mach-O not yet supported
about.summary: Modern Python-native ABI compatibility checker for C/C++ shared libraries

- ABICC drop-in CLI: accepts all major abi-compliance-checker flags

name: abicheck
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set name = "abicheck" %}
{% set version = "0.1.0" %}

package:
  name: {{ name|lower }}
  version: {{ version }}

source:
  url: https://github.com/napetrov/{{ name }}/archive/refs/tags/v{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 2429f0afba461d2a99c45e7c4089d2f86b06ef08493b1ca1a13566069a7894a7

build:
  number: 0
  skip: true  # [not linux or py<310]
  script: {{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . -vv --no-deps --no-build-isolation

requirements:
  host:
    - python
    - pip
    - setuptools >=68
  run:
    - python
    - click >=8.0
    - pyyaml >=6.0
    - defusedxml >=0.7.1
    - pyelftools >=0.29
    - castxml >=0.6.3  # required at runtime for header-based analysis

test:
  imports:
    - abicheck
  commands:
    - abicheck --help
    - abicheck --version
  requires:
    - pip

about:
  home: https://github.com/napetrov/abicheck
  summary: Modern Python-native ABI compatibility checker for C/C++ shared libraries
  description: |
    abicheck is a Python-native ABI compatibility checker for C/C++ shared
    libraries (.so files). It detects breaking changes between library versions
    using a multi-tier approach: castxml header AST analysis, ELF symbol table
    inspection, and DWARF debug info extraction.

    Key features:
    - 85 ChangeKinds across BREAKING / API_BREAK / COMPATIBLE severity tiers
    - 100% parity with abi-compliance-checker (ABICC) for 55 documented scenarios
    - ABICC drop-in CLI: accepts all major abi-compliance-checker flags
    - Policy system: built-in profiles + YAML-based per-project overrides
    - COMPATIBLE_WITH_RISK verdict for deployment-risk changes (e.g. new GLIBC requirements)
    - Reports: Markdown, JSON, SARIF, HTML
    - Linux only (ELF/DWARF); Windows PE and macOS Mach-O not yet supported
  license: Apache-2.0
  license_file: LICENSE
  doc_url: https://github.com/napetrov/abicheck/tree/main/docs
  dev_url: https://github.com/napetrov/abicheck

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - napetrov
